turns.user_message: I used to look forward to my day, but lately I just feel flat. This is new and I don't like it.
Now that flat feeling is there every single morning. I can't seem to shake it off anymore.
I feel completely hollowed out, like there's nothing left inside me to give. It's just an empty shell going through the motions.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be. This just started recently.
